test.details: 52 tests passed (shared) + 376 tests passed (apps/www) + 20 e2e tests passed

appliedUpdates.description: Document that legacy envelope format ({ source, event: { kind } }) is no longer supported after canonical v3 parser cleanup. Invalid formats are now rejected at the worker boundary and dead-lettered.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'test-streams' command to the commands section alongside delivery_loop_preflight and delivery_loop_fast. This enables future workers to discover the real-Redis stream test path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m4-add-real-redis-stream-validation-path added pnpm delivery-loop:local test-streams command that is not listed in services.yaml.
